ops.title: Replay-boundary frame: server emits an explicit end-of-replay marker after the initial SSE flush; SPA gates toasts on it instead of the setTimeout(0) heuristic (fixes spurious toast storm on provider remount/HMR; also fixes latent multi-chunk replay race). Review flag #3, option b.

ops.text: Remount/HMR of a live tab produces zero spurious toasts, verified in browser
